name: discord
description: Send deploy and fleet notifications to Discord
author: muster

config.label: Discord Channel ID
config.hint: Enable Developer Mode, right-click channel > Copy Channel ID

config.label: Discord Application ID (optional)
config.hint: For slash commands — discord.com/developers/applications > Your App > General > Application ID

config.label: Discord Server ID (optional)
config.hint: For slash commands — right-click server name > Copy Server ID
